name: Ada Okonkwo
title: Lead Client Partner, Healthcare
storyTitle: From renewal defense to multi-year growth
summary: Helps LCPs turn tense renewals into joint roadmaps—and know when to walk away.
bio: I spent my first years as an LCP saying yes to everything the client asked. The breakthrough was learning to name tradeoffs out loud and co-design a cadence that protects the team while still elevating the relationship. I mentor on executive presence, expansion plays, and the politics of large health systems.
expertise: Rebuilding trust after a delivery miss
Joint success plans that actually get used
testimonial: “She helped me script a conversation I was dreading—it landed.”

name: Ben Reyes
title: Lead Client Partner, Retail & Consumer
storyTitle: Leading through ambiguity without becoming the bottleneck
summary: Practical systems for delegation, 1:1s, and team health when the roadmap keeps changing.
bio: My mentoring style is blunt-but-kind. We’ll look at your calendar and your leadership stack—where decisions stall, where you’re unintentionally signaling mistrust, and how to reset expectations with peers and teams.
testimonial: “Concrete frameworks I used the same week.”

name: Carmen Duarte
title: Lead Client Partner, Financial Services
storyTitle: Scaling delivery without losing the plot
summary: Designs teaming and governance models for complex programs—especially when risk spikes.
bio: I love the messy middle: multiple workstreams, regulators in the room, and a team that’s tired. I mentor on how to simplify the operating model, make tradeoffs visible, and keep quality from becoming a slogan.
availabilitySummary: Mon/Fri lunch slots (ET), 3 check-outs per month

name: Darius Cole
title: Lead Client Partner, Digital & AI
storyTitle: Turning curiosity into a repeatable practice story
summary: Helps LCPs sharpen an industry POV, package offerings, and run disciplined pursuit reviews.
bio: If your pipeline is a spreadsheet of hope, we should talk. I mentor on how to build a simple pursuit operating rhythm, coach SMEs without creating chaos, and translate buzzwords into client outcomes.
expertise: Pursuit reviews that don’t waste time

name: Elena Park
title: Lead Client Partner, Public Sector
storyTitle: Getting to green inside the firm (and with the client)
summary: Navigating independence, staffing, and escalation paths when stakes are high.
bio: Public sector taught me patience—and paperwork. I mentor on how to build internal coalitions, sequence approvals, and keep client momentum while the machine catches up.

name: Farid Nassar
title: Lead Client Partner, Energy
storyTitle: Holding the line on value (without sounding arrogant)
summary: Coaches LCPs through pricing tension, scope creep, and C-suite dynamics in cyclical industries.
bio: Energy clients feel macro shocks fast. I mentor on how to lead with empathy while protecting margin—scripts, scenarios, and the prep work that makes hard calls feel fair.
expertise: When to bring partners vs. when to absorb
testimonial: “Helped me stop apologizing for our price—and explain it.”

name: Grace Okafor
title: Lead Client Partner, Technology
summary: Helps LCPs map power, align stakeholders, and sponsor others without overcommitting.
bio: Tech clients move quickly; the firm sometimes doesn’t. I mentor on stakeholder maps, crisp decision rights, and how to sponsor people in a way that compounds your time instead of consuming it.

name: Hao Lin
title: Lead Client Partner, Manufacturing
summary: Systems for delivery governance, reviews, and recovery when timelines slip.
bio: Manufacturing clients respect discipline. I mentor on operating rhythms: how to run reviews that catch drift early, how to reset timelines without blame, and how to protect teams from hero culture.
expertise: Quality indicators clients actually care about

name: Isabel Martens
title: Lead Client Partner, Insurance
summary: Connects pipeline discipline with internal collaboration—especially across service lines.
bio: Insurance is relationship-heavy and process-heavy. I mentor on how to run a simple weekly practice rhythm, when to pull in specialists, and how to keep pursuits from dissolving into email threads.

name: Jon Whitaker
title: Lead Client Partner, Media
summary: Helps LCPs coach creative talent, set boundaries, and keep delivery predictable.
bio: Media clients want magic on a deadline. I mentor on how to create safety for creative risk while still holding a bar for delivery—especially in hybrid environments.
